item.title: He Got OBSESSED After an Affair
item.description: When Oregon City veterinarian Steven Milner’s affair with married tech worker Tanya Fandrich ended, his obsession allegedly shifted to her husband, Kenny. Over the next four years, Kenny and Tanya say they were stalked, threatened, tracked with GPS devices, and terrorized while repeated reports to authorities seemed to go nowhere. Then, in January, Kenny Fandrich was found murdered — and Milner was accused. This case raises chilling questions about obsession, escalation, and whether warning signs were ignored until it was too late.

media:content.media:title: He Got OBSESSED After an Affair
media:content.media:description: When Oregon City veterinarian Steven Milner’s affair with married tech worker Tanya Fandrich ended, his obsession allegedly shifted to her husband, Kenny. Over the next four years, Kenny and Tanya say they were stalked, threatened, tracked with GPS devices, and terrorized while repeated reports to authorities seemed to go nowhere. Then, in January, Kenny Fandrich was found murdered — and Milner was accused. This case raises chilling questions about obsession, escalation, and whether warning signs were ignored until it was too late.

item.title: 8-Year-Old Survives & Helps Solve Her Own Case
item.description: Have you heard of the heartbreaking case of Jennifer Shuett before? How brave was this little girl who went through one of the most unimaginable things yet was able to describe his attacker in great detail? What do you think could have been done better to catch this man earlier?

media:content.media:title: 8-Year-Old Survives & Helps Solve Her Own Case
media:content.media:description: Have you heard of the heartbreaking case of Jennifer Shuett before? How brave was this little girl who went through one of the most unimaginable things yet was able to describe his attacker in great detail? What do you think could have been done better to catch this man earlier?

item.title: What Happened In KFC Is Unbelievable To This Day!
item.description: In 1983 in Kilgore Texas a robbery occurred at a local KFC. 5 People disappeared. What went down on that fateful day is what I will be taking you through in my latest True Crime episode. Em x

media:content.media:title: What Happened In KFC Is Unbelievable To This Day!
media:content.media:description: In 1983 in Kilgore Texas a robbery occurred at a local KFC. 5 People disappeared. What went down on that fateful day is what I will be taking you through in my latest True Crime episode. Em x

item.title: They Sacrificed Her for "Slender Man"
item.description: There is something extremely chilling about two 12-year-olds taking part in this grusome violence. Payton survived 19 STABBING wounds that day, along with being betrayed by the ones she deemed the closest... What are your thoughts on this case? - Em x

media:content.media:title: They Sacrificed Her for "Slender Man"
media:content.media:description: There is something extremely chilling about two 12-year-olds taking part in this grusome violence. Payton survived 19 STABBING wounds that day, along with being betrayed by the ones she deemed the closest... What are your thoughts on this case? - Em x
